description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from wrangler. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather in distressed look with textile lining Embossed brand logo on the front Mock flap on the front for further structure and style Two main chambers for keeping cash Convenient chambers to store cards Concealed chamber below coin and card holder to store other essentials CareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
